params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all 911 endpoints provisioned for the account. Each endpoint represents an end user that may place emergency calls.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Provisions a new 911 endpoint for an end user. The endpoint is identified by an Alternate End User ID (AEUI) and must be associated with a validated location for emergency routing.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: endpointId
params.description: The unique identifier for the E911 endpoint

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific 911 endpoint including its associated location and configuration.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: endpointId
params.description: The unique identifier for the E911 endpoint

items.docs: Updates the configuration or location association for a specific 911 endpoint.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: endpointId
params.description: The unique identifier for the E911 endpoint

items.docs: Removes a 911 endpoint from the account. The endpoint will no longer be able to route emergency calls.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all validated locations provisioned for emergency calling within the account.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Provisions a new location for emergency calling. The address is validated against the Master Street Address Guide (MSAG) to ensure it can be properly routed to the correct PSAP. Bandwidth can generate a location ID automatically, or you can provide your own custom location ID.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: locationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the E911 location

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific validated location.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: locationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the E911 location

items.docs: Updates a specific location. The new address will be re-validated against the MSAG.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: locationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the E911 location

items.docs: Removes a location from the account. The location must not be currently associated with any active endpoints.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Retrieves a list of configured notification recipients who are alerted when 911 calls are placed from the account's endpoints.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Configures a new notification recipient to receive alerts when 911 calls are placed from the account's endpoints.
